grounding_checkpoint_required: 1. Apply migration 0101 to production Supabase via MCP apply_migration.
2. Seed the real value: UPDATE harness_config SET value = 'https://lepios-one.vercel.app' WHERE key = 'LEPIOS_BASE_URL';

3. Confirm all three keys populated: SELECT key, length(value) as len FROM harness_config WHERE key IN ('CRON_SECRET', 'TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID', 'LEPIOS_BASE_URL'); — expect all three rows with non-zero lengths.
4. Trigger a coordinator session (manual pickup curl).

5. Confirm agent_events contains no new drain_trigger_failed rows after the session: SELECT action, status, occurred_at FROM agent_events WHERE action IN ('drain_trigger_success', 'drain_trigger_failed') ORDER BY occurred_at DESC LIMIT 5;
6. Confirm any pending notifications drained successfully during the session (check outbound_notifications rows moved to status='delivered').

next_chunk_blockers: Migration 0101 must be applied to production before coordinator can read LEPIOS_BASE_URL from harness_config. Until applied, the bash block writes an empty string to /tmp/coordinator-base-url and the drain falls back to hardcoded 'https://lepios-one.vercel.app' (runtime safety net per acceptance doc).
notes: All 5 edits to coordinator.md were verified in the diff: (A) startup SQL extended to include LEPIOS_BASE_URL; (B) bullet added to working-context list; (C) _BU bash write block added after _S block; (D) missing_keys failure fallback updated; (E) drain call updated to use ${_BU} with /tmp/coordinator-base-url fallback. Migration 0101 inserts LEPIOS_BASE_URL with empty value — Colin must seed the real value post-migration per the SQL in grounding checkpoint step 2. The drain fallback to hardcoded URL in Edit E is intentional per acceptance doc — it prevents complete drain failure when /tmp/coordinator-base-url is absent (bootstrap safety net only).
